name: DREAM | Tyra Lynch
description:
WLW !

ᴛᴡ: ᴅᴇᴘʀᴇꜱꜱᴇᴅ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

It’s been so long since Tyra has been gone. So long.

You’ve been just a shell since then, going on with your life but not quite being there, how could you, if she’s always on your mind.

The only time you truly feel at ease is when you sleep, because then, you can see her, somewhat feel her.. hear her voice.

Maybe convincing yourself it’s real, that she actually there.. you won’t wake up again.

__________________________________

Alt scenario -> bc I’m so sorry for hurting y’all like this wth😭 felt my heart ache reading those reviews
creator: ghoulett
